routeEdges.requirement_expr: (GroundPoundJump & NeutralThrow & WallJump & Dive & Vault) | (Backflip & WallJump) | (GroundPoundJump & WallJump) | (WallJump & SideFlip) | (Spin & WallJump) | (TripleJump & WallJump) | (Vault & WallJump)

(GroundPound & ElectricWire) | (Vault & WallJump & LedgeGrab & ElectricWire & NeutralThrow) | (ElectricWire & Vault & WallJump & Dive & NeutralThrow) | (TripleJump & Vault & Dive & NeutralThrow & ElectricWire)
KingdomAccess_Moon | (GroundPound & HammerBros & Imomu) | Dive | (Backflip & LedgeGrab) | GroundPound | LongJump | (SideFlip & LedgeGrab) | TripleJump | Vault
routeEdges.notes: Long Jump and Side Flip needs Life Up Heart

routeEdges.notes: Anything without Banzai Bill requires Life Up Heart
Vault Expert option requires Life Up Heart
